grant_title: Master of Studies - AI Ethics & Society
geographic_restrictions: None specified; open to international applicants
demographic_requirements: Open to professionals from diverse backgrounds including business, management, policy, technology, design, consultancy, law, and communications
eligibility_summary: The program is designed for professionals seeking to develop expertise in AI ethics, responsible innovation, and socio-technical systems. Applicants should have a professional background and interest in addressing AI-related challenges such as privacy, surveillance, justice, fairness, algorithmic bias, and misinformation.
